ideation: This sequence depicts a woman raising her right hand in greeting or to get attention. The left arm remains at rest. The animation will show a smooth, controlled lift of the right arm, emphasizing grace and intentionality.  The slight movement in the left arm will avoid stiffness. I will use the examples to guide the range of motion and ensure the pose is natural for the robot. Frame 1 will start with a relaxed pose, both arms hanging down. Frame 2 will show the right arm beginning to rise, while the left arm remains still. Frame 3 will capture the right arm reaching its peak, palm facing forward. Frame 4 will show the right arm slightly lowering, still gesturing. Frame 5 will bring the arm back to rest.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
the right arm begins to lift gracefully
the right arm reaches high, palm forward, seeking attention
the right arm lowers slightly, a friendly wave
both arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
